RcsSendMessageFnArn.Description: ARN of the RCS Send Message Lambda (internal invocation)

RcsMessagesTableName.Description: RCS Messages DynamoDB Table Name (stored in the unified RCS templates table)

RcsAnalyticsTopicArn.Description: SNS Topic ARN for RCS Analytics events

RcsDashboardName.Description: CloudWatch Dashboard name for RCS metrics

RcsWebhookUrlFormat.Description: Format for RCS incoming message webhook URL (replace {clinicId} with actual clinic ID)

RcsFallbackUrlFormat.Description: Format for RCS fallback webhook URL (replace {clinicId} with actual clinic ID)

RcsStatusCallbackUrlFormat.Description: Format for RCS status callback URL (replace {clinicId} with actual clinic ID)

RcsFallbackTopicArn.Description: SNS Topic ARN for RCS fallback messages - subscribe to receive alerts when primary webhook fails
